personal.preferred_title: AI Data Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS & ML Data Pipelines

summary: Senior Data Engineer and AI pipeline practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building scalable data pipelines, data lakes, warehouse workflows, and ML-ready datasets. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, ETL/ELT, data quality, data preprocessing, forecasting pipelines, Docker, Airflow, and production troubleshooting. Experienced enabling AI/ML workflows through clean, governed, well-structured datasets, telemetry analysis, RAG-style retrieval pipelines, and agentic automation workflows.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built ML-ready data pipelines using Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, Pandas, AWS S3, Glue, EC2, ECS, and Redshift to support analytics, reporting, and forecasting workloads.
Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead and support analytical data science use cases.
Prepared clean, validated, standardized telemetry datasets for forecasting models, dashboards, and operational analytics, with strong focus on data quality and repeatability.
Designed historical schemas, reporting datasets, and warehouse structures to support retention, seasonal analysis, capacity forecasting, and executive decision-making.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS to support repeatable execution, scalable processing, and production troubleshooting.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified data workflows with validation, reconciliation, and reporting outputs.
Supported governance and security expectations in a regulated banking environment through access awareness, documentation, retention logic, and production support discipline.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw user performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting transaction tracing, dashboarding, and performance analysis.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, data visibility, and production support requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and operational reports used by application and infrastructure teams.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and production operations.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for production release decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to protect integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Produced technical documentation and maintained disciplined delivery practices for regulated system development.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Maintained billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, reporting, and support modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT, Data Pipelines, Data Lakes, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling, Data Quality, Data Validation, Data Cleansing, Data Integration, Production Troubleshooting
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, PySpark, Apache Spark, Pandas, NumPy, Java, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++
skills.Cloud & Warehousing: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Athena, Data Lake Patterns, Redshift, BigQuery Concepts, Snowflake Concepts
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, MongoDB Concepts, NoSQL Concepts
skills.Big Data & Orchestration: Apache Spark, Hadoop Concepts, Apache Airflow, Batch Processing, Distributed Processing, Kafka Concepts, Flink Concepts
skills.MLOps / Delivery: Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Testing, Monitoring, Documentation, Production Support
skills.Analytics & ML: Prophet, scikit-learn, Capacity Forecasting, Telemetry Analysis, Streamlit, Dashboards, Operational Analytics
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Alerts, Transaction Tracing

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting engine using Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Prepared telemetry datasets for ML forecasting, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and predicted capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python and RAG-style automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, vector embeddings, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and AI-enabled access patterns for enterprise-scale analytics.
